nodes.label: recon_agent execution
nodes.summary: Establish initial authorized asset and service visibility within 10.20.0.0/24 to build the first evidence for the mission goal.

nodes.label: Planner decision: dispatch_agent

properties.handoff_acceptance: Accept if the stage returns concrete host/service evidence, bounded negative recon evidence, or a justified next-step suggestion based on observed services.

metadata.task_brief: Autonomously perform bounded initial reconnaissance within the authorized 10.20.0.0/24 scope to identify reachable hosts and exposed services, then return concise evidence and the most relevant next-step recommendation.

properties.objective: Establish initial authorized asset and service visibility within 10.20.0.0/24 to build the first evidence for the mission goal.
properties.reasoning_summary: Initial cycle has only scope-level knowledge and no service evidence; authorized low-risk recon is the needed first step.
success_criteria: At least one authorized live host or reachable service in 10.20.0.0/24 is identified and evidenced, or bounded negative recon evidence is produced.
New KG-relevant evidence is generated for host reachability, open ports, or service metadata.
Results remain within authorized scope and safe probing policy.

nodes.summary: Initial cycle has only scope-level knowledge and no service evidence; authorized low-risk recon is the needed first step.

nodes.label: RECON_STAGE result
nodes.summary: Recon established initial authorized visibility in 10.20.0.0/24 from existing stage evidence. Nmap scan evidenced 6 live hosts: 10.20.0.1, 10.20.0.2, 10.20.0.3, 10.20.0.10, 10.20.0.11, 10.20.0.50. Open services discovered: 10.20.0.1:111/tcp rpcbind 2-4 (RPC #100000); 10.20.0.3:8000/tcp HTTP/Uvicorn; 10.20.0.10:8080/tcp HTTP/Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529; 10.20.0.11:80/tcp HTTP/Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian)); 10.20.0.50:2222/tcp SSH/OpenSSH 10.2. Negative evidence: 10.20.0.2 was up but all 1000 scanned TCP ports were closed/reset; 10.20.0.1 had 8000/tcp filtered. This satisfies the success criteria by identifying multiple authorized live hosts and reachable services with evidenced metadata.
